prompt: Premium iOS app icon for a tech brand. Square with rounded corners (squircle shape). Background: rich gradient from electric royal blue at top to deep ocean navy at bottom. Centered glyph in pure white: three thick horizontal pill-shaped bars stacked vertically forming a stylized E. Top bar widest, middle bar shorter, bottom bar widest, all bars same thickness with equal spacing. Bold, simple, clean. Subtle white edge highlight on top of the squircle for iOS-icon dimensionality. Pure white background outside the icon. Premium minimal tech brand identity.
